text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, I find Super Creek in the library.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, fancy seeing you here. Are you on the hunt
for a book too, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking for a reference book to help with my
world history and classic literature homework.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I don't know... there are so many options, the
moment I think I've made a choice, another
goody pops out.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um... if it's all right with you, I could help you
search!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, hi there, Rob Roy.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for the sudden interjection. I just happened
to overhear your conversation, so...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, not at all! I'd really appreciate your help. ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
O-okay! As the student library assistant, I'm
confident I'll find you the perfect publication!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Well, right off the bat, I think this reference book
might be just what you need!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
It has plenty of annotations on relevant
terminology, and it's full of diagrams too, making
it a pretty easy read, I think! There's even some
funny trivia included...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that sounds absolutely perfect. You've really
sold me on it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...Oops, s-sorry for rambling on like that!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Heehee, don't worry! It's lovely that you have
something to be passionate about.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We should believe in our passions and keep
working at them, because they're something to be
proud of. ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you very much... That's encouraging.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to study more from your
recommendations, Rob Roy. Can we keep looking
around? ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I do have some other ideas, so let's see
how the other books compare!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the two of them continue their search.
But before long...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh? What happens next?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... "But they still couldn't pull out the giant
carrot. That's when they decided to work
together and..."

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Um, is that... a picture book?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm sorry! I saw this book and thought it
would be great for the kids, so... here I am...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
It does look like a nice picture book. I can
imagine it, too... children smiling at story time.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... but I'll have to save that for another day! I
came here to find a reference book.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Right then, world history... world history...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh? Oh, goodness me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Rob Roy, I think I've found the perfect picture
book for you.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: For... me?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The blurb says it's about a hero who vanquishes a
terrible dragon. ♪ Oh, it sounds fantastic!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: That's one we recently got in stock! I haven't been able to read it yet, but I think... no, I know I'll love the story!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Heehee. I figured as much. I'll read it to you as
many times as you want. ♪
choice_data_list: You've got to find a reference book!
I wanna hear the story too.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're right! What am I doing? I'm sorry I
keep getting distracted.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
It's... it's my fault too for getting so excited...
Okay, we have to get serious with our search!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Right, classical literature... classical literature...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Ooh... This one's called The Dogfather and the Stray Wolf. It might be nice for story time too.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Um, I don't think that's the type of "dogfather"
you're thinking about.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, I'm very sorry! I'm so silly sometimes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek continues her search for a reference
book, all the while struggling against her
nurturing tendencies.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm quite happy to read it to you as well,
Trainer. Are you ready?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: "A long, long time ago, a dreadful dragon attacked a poor village and caused ever so much trouble for the townsfolk..."

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Creek's voice is so calming. I suddenly feel so...
relaxed.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Teehee. Go ahead and take a little nap, it's fine.
There, there. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a refreshing story time, Super Creek
resumes her book hunt with a renewed sense of
purpose.
